name: NLIGHT, INC.
summary: nLIGHT, Inc. designs, manufactures, and sells high-power semiconductor lasers, fiber lasers, fiber amplifiers, and beam combination and control systems. Products serve aerospace and defense (directed energy, laser sensing), industrial (cutting, welding, additive manufacturing), and microfabrication markets. The company operates two segments: Laser Products and Advanced Development, the latter focused on next-generation directed energy and laser sensing technologies for governmental agencies.

products.name: Semiconductor Lasers
products.description: High-power lasers with broad range of power levels, wavelengths, and output fiber sizes using patented multiplexed single-chip architecture.

products.name: Fiber Lasers
products.description: Programmable, serviceable high-power fiber lasers for aerospace, defense, and industrial applications with programmable beam sizes and shapes.

products.name: Fiber Amplifiers
products.description: High-performance fiber amplifiers offering high efficiency, compact design, and superior beam quality for aerospace, defense, and industrial applications.

products.name: Beam Combination and Control Systems
products.description: Systems for use in high-energy laser systems for directed energy and laser sensing defense applications.

products.name: High Energy Pulsed Fiber Lasers
products.description: High energy CW and pulsed fiber lasers for directed energy and laser sensing defense applications.
